title: AgentOS Field Bindings
description: Schema for field-bindings.json — the live mapping from agentOS.yaml board field definitions to GitHub Projects v2 GraphQL node IDs. Generated by 'agentOS apply --board-only'. Do not edit by hand.

schema_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the board.fields block in agentOS.yaml at provisioning time. Used to detect drift.

board_id.description: GitHub Projects v2 board node ID.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was generated.

fields.description: Map of field name to field binding. Keys match the 'name' values in agentOS.yaml board.fields.

node_id.description: GitHub Projects v2 field node ID (PVTF_... or PVTSSF_...).

options.description: For single_select fields: map of option name to option ID.
